# Associate Software/Platform Engineer
...
Pune 0-2 Years ₹7–12 LPA Posted today 💼 Hybrid
...
## Job Description
...
- Seeking Software Developers with strong Python skills to support the implementation of scalable AI use cases using an enterprise AI platform. This role is ideal for early‑career engineers eager to grow in applied AI development while working under the mentorship of Senior AI Engineers.
...
- Develop and integrate Python-based components for AI use cases following established designs and best practices.
- Support AI/ML workflows including data preparation, model integration, and API-based consumption.
- Implement and support RAG-based pipelines, including understanding of LLMs, chunking strategies, embeddings, and vector retrieval under guidance.
- Collaborate with Senior AI Engineers to build scalable, reliable, and maintainable AI solutions.
- Assist in testing, debugging, documentation, and deployment of AI-enabled applications.
- Learn and apply cloud, AI, and software engineering best practices through hands-on project work and mentorship.
...
### Technical Skills
...
- Strong Python programming with solid software development fundamentals
- Basic understanding of AI/ML concepts and applied AI use cases
- Familiarity with REST APIs, data handling, and modular code design
- Exposure to cloud platforms and modern development tools with a strong learning mindset
...
MetLife, Inc. is a global leader in insurance, annuities, and employee benefits headquartered in New York City, serving 90+ million customers across 40+ countries with comprehensive life insurance, retirement solutions, and digital platforms powering financial security worldwide. Founded in 1863, MetLife leverages AI-driven underwriting, cloud-native applications, and data analytics through major technology centers in Hyderabad, Bangalore, and Noida to deliver personalized insurance experiences and enterprise digital transformation.

# Senior JAVA Developer AI Engineering job at MetLife in Cary, NC
...
Title: Senior JAVA Developer AI Engineering
...
Job Description:
...
We're looking for a senior engineer who is passionate about engineering, excellence, and developer experience. In this role, you will drive org-wide AI adoption, test automation strategy, and DevEx improvements, partnering with product teams to design reusable frameworks, platforms, and best practices that significantly accelerate delivery while improving quality and security.
...
Key Responsibilities:
...
- Design and deliver AI-assisted development workflows (e.g., code generation, refactoring assistance, knowledge search, test generation) using tools like GitHub Copilot, Azure OpenAI, and M365 Copilot.
...
- Build AI services and integration patterns (e.g., prompt engineering libraries, retrieval-augmented generation, model evaluation, guardrails, observability).
...
- Build platform tooling
...
CI/CD pipelines, reusable GitHub Actions/Azure DevOps templates, standardized build/release workflows, and
...
- Implement observability for DevEx: DORA metrics (lead time, deployment frequency, MTTR, change failure rate), build times, flaky tests, PR cycle time.
...
- Run productivity experiments and A/B tests (e.g., Copilot on/off, pipeline caching strategies) and scale what works.
...
implement test pyramids across unit, integration, contract, and end-to-end layers.
...
- Build and scale test automation frameworks (e.g., Playwright/Cypress/Selenium, REST API testing, Pact for consumer-driven contracts, performance testing with k6/JMeter).
...
Essential Business Experience and Technical Skills:
...
- 7+ years of professional software engineering experience with full-stack development.
- Proven track record in test automation frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, and developer productivity tooling.
- Strong proficiency in front-end (React, Angular, or similar) and back-end (Java or J2EE, or Python) technologies.
...
- Expertise in automated testing tools (Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, JUnit, PyTest) and/or contract testing (Pact).
...
- Hands-on experience with CI/CD platforms (GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps) and cloud environments (Azure preferred, AWS/GCP acceptable).
- Familiarity with AI-assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, Azure OpenAI) and prompt engineering concepts.

results.title: Sudhamsh Reddy Chirrapu
highlights:
Generative AI Engineer | LLMs • RAG • Document Intelligence Specialist | Building IntelliDocs AI Platform | Python, AWS & GCP NLP, Vector Search, Prompt Engineering | Python | AWS & GCP
...
Senior Gen AI Engineer at [MetLife](https://www.linkedin.com/company/metlife)
...
I am a Senior Generative AI Engineer with over 10 years of hands-on experience designing, developing, and deploying production-grade AI/ML and Generative AI solutions across highly regulated industries including insurance, healthcare, banking, and e-commerce. Currently at MetLife in New York, I serve as the lead architect and developer of IntelliDocs, a Generative AI–powered Document Intelligence and Insurance Knowledge Assistant platform. I built end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems integrated with Large Language Models, advanced NLP pipelines, vector search, and intelligent conversational agents that automate policy summarization, claims extraction, document classification, and real-time knowledge retrieval for customer service teams and internal operations. This platform has significantly improved operational efficiency and customer experience by delivering secure, context-aware AI assistance at scale using Python, AWS (Bedrock, SageMaker, EKS, Lambda), GCP (Vertex AI, BigQuery), and modern LLM frameworks such as Hugging Face and LangChain. Prior to MetLife, I spent two and a half years at Virtusa building a GenAI-powered Document Intelligence and Healthcare Support Chatbot Platform for Elevance Health. I designed scalable NLP and machine learning pipelines to process unstructured medical documents, claims data, and policy records while integrating LLMs to deliver automated customer support responses and intelligent recommendations. Earlier in my career, I developed real-time fraud detection and customer risk analytics models at Citibank using PySpark, Scikit-learn, and AWS, and created product recommendation engines and large-scale analytics solutions at eBay. I began my journey as a Python developer at Goldman Sachs, where I built high-performance backend services and data processing systems for trading and risk management. My technical foundation spans Generative AI and LLMs (including GPT, Llama, Bedrock, Vertex AI, prompt engineering, embeddings, and vector search), natural language processing, deep learning frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow), big data processing (Apache Spark, PySpark, Apache Beam), cloud-native MLOps on AWS and GCP (Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, CI/CD), and RESTful API development with FastAPI and Flask. I am passionate about transforming complex unstructured data into secure, compliant, and business-impactful AI solutions in regulated environments.
...
### Senior Gen AI Engineer at [MetLife](https://www.linkedin.com/company/metlife) (Current)
...
Designed and developed a GenAI powered Document Intelligence and Healthcare Support Chatbot Platform for Elevance Health to automate healthcare document processing and enhance member support services. Built advanced NLP pipelines and machine learning models using Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch to analyze medical documents, claims data, and policy guidelines. Implemented LLM-integrated conversational chatbots to deliver intelligent automated responses for customer support agents and internal teams. Developed scalable data ingestion and processing pipelines with Apache Beam, designed RESTful APIs using Flask/FastAPI, and deployed AI services on GCP and AWS for high-volume healthcare workloads. Performed data preprocessing, feature engineering, predictive analytics, and model monitoring while collaborating in an Agile environment to improve response efficiency, document classification, and overall member experience

screening • algorithms • scanning electron microscopy (sem) • mlops • mlops pipelines • testing • analysis • electron microscopy • scanning electron microscopy • research • history • architecture • illumination • research assistant • electron • segmentation • pipelines • well • biomedical image analysis • microscopy • learning algorithms • detection • logistics • representation • ai (artificial intelligence) • image analysis • deep learning research • lipid • automation • leadership • score • data analytics • computer architecture • teaching • surveillance • predictive analytics • biomedical • framework • dice • regression • risk management • teaching assistant • vision research • computer scientist • random forest • computer vision • confocal microscopy • ai engineer • facilitating • engineer • random forest regression • data • learning research • sparse representation • cells • deep learning • object detection • deep learning algorithms
...
### The Principles of Data-Centric AI
...
Data is a crucial infrastructure to how artificial intelligence (AI) systems learn. However, these systems to date have been largely model-centric, putting a premium on the model at the expense of the data quality. Data quality issues beset the performance of AI systems, particularly in downstream deployments and in real-world applications. Data-centric AI (DCAI) as an emerging concept brings data, its quality and its dynamism to the forefront in considerations of AI systems through an iterative and systematic approach. As one of the first overviews, this article brings together data-centric perspectives and concepts to outline the foundations of DCAI. It specifically formulates six guiding principles for researchers and practitioners and gives direction for future advancement of DCAI. Show less

results.title: Naveen Ajay Kumar N.
highlights:
AI/ML Engineer | Data Scientist | Building Agentic AI, LLM & RAG Systems | LangChain · LangGraph · GPT-4 · AWS SageMaker | Python · Machine Learning · NLP · MLOps | Azure
...
Software Developer AI developer at [MetLife](https://www.linkedin.com/company/metlife)
...
I'm an AI/ML Engineer with ~5 years of experience building production-grade Generative AI, Agentic AI, and LLM-powered systems in enterprise environments at MetLife and CGI. My core focus is designing end-to-end intelligent systems — RAG pipelines, LangGraph multi-agent workflows, LLM fine-tuning (LoRA/PEFT), and Prompt Engineering — using Python, Hugging Face, LangChain, FAISS, Pinecone, AWS SageMaker, and Azure ML. I also build classical ML systems using XGBoost, BERT, PySpark, and MLflow for production deployment. I'm currently open to AI Engineer, ML Engineer, and Data Scientist roles focused on Generative AI and Agentic AI. Let's connect.
...
### Software Developer AI developer at [MetLife](https://www.linkedin.com/company/metlife) (Current)
...
I am currently working as a Machine Learning Engineer at MetLife Inc., where I focus on building scalable, production-grade AI systems to automate and optimize insurance claim processing workflows. My work involves designing and deploying end-to-end machine learning pipelines—from data ingestion and preprocessing to model training, validation, and deployment—ensuring robustness and efficiency in real-world environments. A key area of my work is developing anomaly detection systems using techniques such as Isolation Forest and LSTM autoencoders to identify irregular claim patterns and support fraud detection. I also implement automated model retraining workflows using MLflow integrated with CI/CD pipelines, enabling continuous monitoring and improvement of model performance. In addition, I am actively working on agentic AI frameworks, where I design and orchestrate intelligent agents that can autonomously execute multi-step claim processing tasks. These agents operate based on structured playbooks—defined workflows that guide decision-making, trigger model inferences, and handle actions like validation, routing, and exception handling. This approach enhances automation, adaptability, and operational efficiency across the system. I also build Power BI dashboards to track model performance, drift metrics, and key operational KPIs, providing stakeholders with clear, data-driven insights into system behavior and business impact.
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence
...
model deployment and
...
I worked on a data science project focused on building a predictive customer risk and fraud detection system using machine learning techniques. The objective of the project was to analyze large volumes of customer transaction and behavioral data to identify high-risk patterns and potential fraudulent activities. I developed predictive models using algorithms such as gradient boosting and ensemble learning to classify risk levels and detect anomalies in transaction data. The solution incorporated advanced feature engineering and data preprocessing techniques to improve model accuracy and reliability, enabling the business to proactively identify suspicious activities and reduce operational risk. To support large-scale data processing, I implemented data pipelines using Apache Spark and PySpark, allowing efficient analysis of millions of records from enterprise databases. The models were evaluated using cross-validation and performance metrics such as precision, recall, and F1-score to ensure robust predictions. I also created interactive dashboards using Tableau to help stakeholders monitor model outputs and identify trends in customer risk behavior. This project improved fraud detection capabilities, enabled faster data-driven decisions, and strengthened the organization’s analytics-driven approach to risk management.

highlights:

...
Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Vice President
...
We are looking for an Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Vice President with a robust background in Generative AI, Machine Learning, enterprise architecture, cloud platforms, and scalable solution design. You will be responsible for designing and implementing AI-enabled solutions that are secure, resilient, compliant, and aligned with enterprise architecture standards. This role requires strong experience in translating business requirements into end-to-end AI solution architectures, including platform integration, governance, observability, and production readiness. The ideal candidate will work across business, engineering, security, data, and risk teams to deliver scalable and responsible AI solutions for enterprise use cases.
...
The team you will be joining plays a vital role in enabling enterprise AI adoption by building secure, scalable, and governance-aligned architecture for Generative AI and Machine Learning solutions. This role is important because it helps ensure AI solutions are designed for production readiness, compliance, interoperability, and long-term business value across the organization.
...
As an Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Vice President, you will:
...
• Design end-to-end AI/ML and Generative AI solution architectures for enterprise use cases, including model integration, orchestration, APIs, data flows, and downstream system interactions.
...
• Define and implement reference architectures, architecture standards, and best practices for AI platforms and shared services.
...
• Collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, data scientists, and engineering teams to convert business problems into scalable technical solutions.
...

...
• Drive POCs, architecture assessments, technical reviews, and production onboarding for AI applications and platforms.
...
• Partner with platform, cloud, security, and DevSecOps teams to ensure production readiness, observability, access control, and operational excellence.
...
• Establish reusable design patterns for prompt engineering, RAG, model serving, agentic workflows, and AI service integration where applicable.
...

...

...

...
• Expertise in designing scalable, secure, and resilient enterprise architectures for data- and AI-driven applications.
...

...

Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.

Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
